scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate -w auth-service && npm run prisma:generate -w users-service && npm run prisma:generate -w cms-service && npm run prisma:generate -w convocatoria-service && npm run prisma:generate -w cohort-service && npm run prisma:generate -w activity-service && npm run prisma:generate -w evidence-service && npm run prisma:generate -w certificate-service && npm run prisma:generate -w seedbed-service && npm run prisma:generate -w pmo-service && npm run prisma:generate -w report-service
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run prisma:migrate -w auth-service -- --name init_auth && npm run prisma:migrate -w users-service -- --name init_users && npm run prisma:migrate -w cms-service -- --name init_cms && npm run prisma:migrate -w convocatoria-service -- --name init_convocatoria && npm run prisma:migrate -w cohort-service -- --name init_cohort && npm run prisma:migrate -w activity-service -- --name init_activity && npm run prisma:migrate -w evidence-service -- --name init_evidence && npm run prisma:migrate -w certificate-service -- --name init_certificate && npm run prisma:migrate -w seedbed-service -- --name init_seedbed && npm run prisma:migrate -w pmo-service -- --name init_pmo && npm run prisma:migrate -w report-service -- --name init_report
scripts.prisma:seed: npm run prisma:seed -w auth-service && npm run prisma:seed -w users-service && npm run prisma:seed -w cms-service && npm run prisma:seed -w convocatoria-service && npm run prisma:seed -w cohort-service && npm run prisma:seed -w activity-service && npm run prisma:seed -w evidence-service && npm run prisma:seed -w certificate-service && npm run prisma:seed -w seedbed-service && npm run prisma:seed -w pmo-service && npm run prisma:seed -w report-service
scripts.setup:db: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -k -n auth,users,cms,convocatoria,cohort,activity,evidence,certificate,seedbed,pmo,report,gateway,public,platform "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:users" "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev:convocatoria" "npm run dev:cohort" "npm run dev:activity" "npm run dev:evidence" "npm run dev:certificate" "npm run dev:seedbed" "npm run dev:pmo" "npm run dev:report" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:web-public" "npm run dev:web-platform"
